## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature idea.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Possible UX / UI Ideas
If relevant, describe how this could work visually or interactively.

## Additional Context
Add any extra details, references, or examples here.
